content.speakerText: I should head to the next session—great chatting with you!
content.speakerTextCn: 我该去下一个环节了，跟你聊得很开心！

options.text: Same here! Let's keep in touch.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Same here! Let's keep in touch.' 既回应了对方的积极情绪，又表达了继续联系的意愿，符合礼貌道别的语境。选项2虽然简洁，但缺乏情感回应，显得冷淡；选项3和4语气负面，违反礼貌原则。

content.speakerText: It's been wonderful talking with you—I have to run now.
content.speakerTextCn: 和你聊天太愉快了，我得走了。

options.text: Yeah, me too. See you around.
Don't go yet, we just started!

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Yeah, me too. See you around.' 以轻松自然的方式回应，保持了积极语气并暗示未来再见。选项2和4态度粗鲁，破坏氛围；选项3忽视对方的合理离开理由，显得不礼貌。

content.speakerText: I really enjoyed our conversation. I should get going now.
content.speakerTextCn: 我真的很享受我们的对话，我该走了。

options.text: Thanks for the chat! Hope you have a fantastic day!
Why are you leaving so early?
Can you stay a little longer? I'm not done talking.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Thanks for the chat! Hope you have a fantastic day!' 表达了感谢并送上美好祝愿，是礼貌道别的经典表达。选项2语气冷漠；选项3和4带有指责或强求，不符合自然结束对话的原则。
